rationale: In the citing paper, Zhang and Krishna (2007) is used as one item in grouped citations to illustrate prior assortment-size studies using actual purchase data. It appears in broad background positioning (including the taxonomy/related-literature listing), not as a distinct theoretical or empirical anchor for this paper's hypotheses, mechanisms, or modeling choices. The paper's core framework and tests are built around categorization congruency and shelf layout work (especially Morales et al. 2005), so this citation functions as contextual prior evidence only.
